title: No known planned conflict is not a live-open confirmation
purpose: Prevent the absence of a known planned restriction from being rendered as proof that a movement is currently open.

limitations: This scenario defines product status semantics and does not assert current road conditions.

then.subject: route_status.realtime
then.rationale: The product has no live evidence for current passage.

then.subject: route_status.realtime
then.rationale: A missing conflict is not affirmative evidence of an open road.

then.subject: route_status.planned
then.rationale: Planned and live status answer different questions and should both remain visible.
